title: Add Magic Story Image to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Magic Story Image](https://msi.jieren.my.id/) to image
- Changes images from drawings or pictures into a magical, children friendly picture. Uses a website interface for the conversion.

Fixes #11765

gist.headline: Once Upon a Pixel
gist.blurb: A new community app just landed! Magic Story Image transforms your everyday drawings and photos into magical, child-friendly storybook illustrations.
gist.summary: Added the community-built 'Magic Story Image' app to the ecosystem, which converts standard drawings and pictures into magical, child-friendly illustrations.
gist.impact: Users can now easily transform their images into whimsical storybook-style art through a dedicated web interface.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee (Polly) acting as a wizard or storyteller, transforming a simple drawing into a glowing, magical storybook illustration. Represents the 'Magic Story Image' app's core function.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, waving a small wand at a canvas where a simple sketch is transforming into a glowing, magical storybook illustration. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, waving a small wand at a canvas where a simple sketch is transforming into a glowing, magical storybook illustration. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
